_meta.description: Major Government of India agricultural schemes for farmers.
_meta.source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, GoI

schemes.name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
schemes.benefit: ₹6,000/year in 3 instalments of ₹2,000 directly to bank account
schemes.eligibility: All landholding farmer families (excludes income tax payers, govt. employees, pensioners >₹10,000/month)
schemes.how_to_apply: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC centre. Need: Aadhaar, bank account, land records.

schemes.name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.benefit: Crop insurance covering losses from natural calamities, pests, diseases. Farmer pays only 2% (Kharif), 1.5% (Rabi), 5% (horticulture) premium.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas. Loanee and non-loanee both eligible.
schemes.how_to_apply: Apply through crop loan at bank, or pmfby.gov.in, or insurance company before cut-off date (usually 7 days after sowing).

schemes.name: Soil Health Card (SHC) Scheme
schemes.benefit: Free soil testing every 2 years + customised fertiliser recommendation card. Saves cost by reducing excess fertiliser use.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers. Collect soil sample from 0–15 cm depth from your field.
schemes.how_to_apply: Collect soil sample and submit to nearest Soil Testing Lab or KVK. Result comes as SHC with NPK recommendations.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.benefit: Short-term crop loan at 7% p.a. (effective 4% with interest subvention for timely repayment). Limit up to ₹3 lakh without collateral.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers, tenant farmers, SHG/JLG groups. No income limit.
schemes.how_to_apply: Apply at any bank branch with land records, ID proof, passport photo. Can also apply at CSC or NABARD offices.

schemes.name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
schemes.benefit: Subsidy on drip (45–55%) and sprinkler (35–45%) irrigation. Higher subsidy for SC/ST/Small & Marginal farmers.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers. SC/ST, Small/Marginal farmers get higher subsidy (55% on drip).
schemes.how_to_apply: Apply through State Horticulture/Agriculture Department or pmksy.gov.in. Subsidy credited after installation verification.

schemes.name: eNAM – National Agriculture Market
schemes.benefit: Online APMC mandi trading platform. Transparent price discovery, direct payment to bank account, reduces middlemen.
schemes.eligibility: Any farmer can register and sell through 1,361+ registered mandis across 23 states.
schemes.how_to_apply: Register at enam.gov.in or through your local APMC office. Need: Aadhaar, bank account.

schemes.name: PM KUSUM Yojana
schemes.benefit: 60% subsidy (Central 30% + State 30%) on standalone solar irrigation pumps (Component B). Farmers also earn income by supplying solar power to grid (Component A).
schemes.eligibility: Individual farmers, groups, cooperatives, panchayats. Priority to grid-unconnected areas.
schemes.how_to_apply: Apply through State DISCOM or Renewable Energy Department. Check state-specific portal.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
schemes.benefit: Capital investment grants for agri-infrastructure, FPO support, agri-startups. RAFTAAR component: agri-entrepreneurship loans up to ₹25 lakh with 40% grant.
schemes.eligibility: Individual farmers, FPOs, agri-startups, state agencies. RAFTAAR for agri-entrepreneurs up to 40 years.
schemes.how_to_apply: Apply through State Agriculture Department. RAFTAAR: apply through NABARD / State govt.
